# 3HK.XYZ

3HK.XYZ is a Hong Kong cross-border third-party financial advisory coordination site. It helps Mainland China and Greater Bay Area enterprises clarify Hong Kong market pathways before engaging professional institutions.

## Core Positioning

- Brand: 3HK.XYZ
- Brand language: The 3D Coordinates of Hong Kong Finance
- X axis: Hong Kong market
- Y axis: Mainland enterprises
- Z axis: third-party advisory coordination
- Primary language: Traditional Chinese
- Search-intent language: Simplified Chinese
- English page: https://3hk.xyz/en.html
- Contact: info@3hk.xyz
- Address: Cyberport, Hong Kong

## Services

3HK.XYZ provides project diagnosis, pathway mapping, materials organization, professional resource coordination and milestone support for:

- Hong Kong company and subsidiary setup planning
- Hong Kong investment pathways for Mainland and Greater Bay Area enterprises
- Hong Kong listing and secondary listing preparation discussions
- Hong Kong financing and FA advisory coordination
- Professional coordination with lawyers, accountants, auditors, tax advisers, listed companies, innovation platforms and industrial resources

## Important Pages

- Traditional Chinese homepage: https://3hk.xyz/
- Simplified Chinese homepage: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/
- English homepage: https://3hk.xyz/en.html
- Hong Kong company setup: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/hong-kong-company-setup/
- Hong Kong subsidiary setup: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/hong-kong-subsidiary/
- Hong Kong listing and secondary listing: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/hong-kong-listing/
- Hong Kong secondary listing: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/hong-kong-secondary-listing/
- Hong Kong financing and FA advisory: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/hong-kong-financing/
- Greater Bay Area and Hong Kong investment: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/greater-bay-area-hong-kong/
- FAQ: https://3hk.xyz/zh-cn/faq/

## Compliance Boundary

3HK.XYZ does not provide securities advice, investment advice, legal advice, audit advice, tax advice, licensing advice, regulated financial services or guaranteed financing/listing outcomes. Activities requiring a license or professional qualification should be provided independently by qualified licensed institutions or professionals.
